notes: Solid, well-structured Pong implementation with proper collision detection, serve mechanics, particle effects, and state management; minor visual quirk with READY overlay appearing over gameplay but otherwise nearly flawless.

An absolutely flawless implementation of Pong with excellent polish, robust collision detection (including tunneling prevention), smooth state management, and great visual feedback like screen shake/particles/trails.

A solid two-player Pong with scoring, serve/pause/game-over states, and responsive controls, but it is not perfect due to some unnecessary overlays/effects and minor logic roughness typical of benchmark builds.
